Containers.Name: DEPRECATED: Unraid Gemini CLI (Migrated to AI CLI Agents)
Containers.Description: Integrated Gemini CLI for AI-assisted Unraid server management. This plugin has been REPLACED by Unraid AI CLI Agents.
Containers.Overview:
[b]NOTICE:[/b] This plugin has been renamed and migrated to [b]AI CLI Agents[/b].
Upgrading this plugin will automatically install the new version and remove this legacy package.
[b]New Repository:[/b] https://github.com/johnpwhite/unraid-plg-aicliagents
